feature1_desc: Auto-fetch PNR, track live train status, and find your exact coach position.
feature2_desc: Camera-based station recognition and platform guidance. Never get lost again.
feature3_desc: Set destination alarms. We will wake you up before your station arrives.
feature4_desc: Share live location with family and get instant help with one-touch SOS.
hero_desc: Yathrava assists elderly, children, and first-time travelers to safely navigate Indian Railways.
no_journeys: No recent journeys found. Add a PNR to track.
sos_desc: Need immediate assistance? Alert Railway Protection Force and share your location instantly.
